title: Linux 7.3 Enabling Second Graphics Pipe For Modern AMD APUs
summary: AMD on Thursday sent out another round of AMDGPU kernel graphics driver and AMDKFD kernel compute driver updates to DRM-Next of new feature material ahead of the Linux 7.3 merge window...
